content:
# Ph_Measurement

**Summary**: The measurement of the acidity or alkalinity of a solution.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] measured pH to determine its impact on mineral dissolution and carbonate stability.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] Critical for determining the rate of mineral dissolution and carbonate precipitation.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] Measured using an HI 2216 pH/ORP/ISE HANNA instrument.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Optimal conditions for carbon sequestration were found at lower pH values (around 3-4). ([[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025, p. 41]])
